privileged_info_summary: The task creates a waypoint at San Jose VOR (SJC), coordinates 37.3747°N 121.9445°W, on the 320-degree radial at 15 NM distance. The target waypoint location is correctly specified as latitude 37.566°N, longitude 122.147°W (calculated value: 37.5659°N 122.1473°W, error 0.013 NM). The 0.05-degree tolerance translates to approximately 3 nautical miles, matching the verifier's threshold. All metadata values are accurate and based on real aviation navigation data.
